description: Style Noteipanema sandals draw inspiration from the culture of the Brazilian city of ipanema. The tropical city's street style is reinterpreted in ipanema footwear - bold prints, vibrant colours and quirky embellishments. A brand with a cause, iPanema collaborated with Gisele Bü ndchen for a climate change project and these products represent their commitment to social-change.Product Detailsflip flops with thong style straps with bow detail and a toe separatorGold and brown striped and textured footbed  Textured TPU outsoleMaterial and CareSynthetic, plasticWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
